languages.text: "Моя новая ступня при ходьбе издает странный звук. Так и должно быть?"
"My new foot makes an odd sound when I walk. Is it supposed to do that?"
languages.original_text: "Моя новая ступня при ходьбе издает странный звук. Так и должно быть?"

traits.locale_text: "My new foot makes an odd sound when I walk. Is it supposed to do that?"
"My new foot makes an odd sound when I walk. Is it supposed to do that?"
"My new foot makes an odd sound when I walk. Is it supposed to do that?"

languages.text: 「新しい足は歩くと変な音がする。そうするのが普通なの？」
languages.original_text: "My new foot makes an odd sound when I walk. Is it supposed to do that?"

languages.text: "Yeni ayağım, yürürken tuhaf bir ses çıkarıyor. Bu normal mi acaba?"
languages.original_text: "My new foot makes an odd sound when I walk. Is it supposed to do that?"

traits.locale_text: "Yeni ayağım, yürürken tuhaf bir ses çıkarıyor. Bu normal mi acaba?"

languages.text: “我的新脚走路时会发出怪声，这正常吗？”
languages.original_text: "My new foot makes an odd sound when I walk. Is it supposed to do that?"

traits.locale_text: “我的新脚走路时会发出怪声，这正常吗？”

languages.text: "Mein neuer Fuß macht beim Gehen seltsame Geräusche. Ist das normal?"
languages.original_text: "My new foot makes an odd sound when I walk. Is it supposed to do that?"

traits.locale_text: "Mein neuer Fuß macht beim Gehen seltsame Geräusche. Ist das normal?"

languages.text: « Mon nouveau pied fait un drôle de bruit quand il touche le sol. C'est normal ? »
languages.original_text: "My new foot makes an odd sound when I walk. Is it supposed to do that?"

traits.locale_text: « Mon nouveau pied fait un drôle de bruit quand il touche le sol. C'est normal ? »

languages.text: «Mi pie nuevo hace un ruido raro al andar. ¿Eso es normal?».
languages.original_text: "My new foot makes an odd sound when I walk. Is it supposed to do that?"

traits.locale_text: «Mi pie nuevo hace un ruido raro al andar. ¿Eso es normal?».
